hyperedges.label: SKU Data Collection Pipeline - All Tiers
Consent System Flow
hyperedges.description: GlobalConsent state machine with RecordVisibility control, batch apply logic, edge case handling, and 10 test scenarios. Involves: consent_state_machine, PrivacyControlCenterPage, consent_edge_cases, batch_apply_consent, consent_test_cases

hyperedges.label: Audio Processing Architecture
hyperedges.description: Unified audio pipeline spanning preprocessing, speaker verification, diarization, and STT. Java source-of-truth with TS bridge. Includes MFCC similarity, WeSpeaker embeddings, and WhisperX optimization. Participants: audio_pipeline_unification, voice_enrollment_level2, pyannote_diarization_issue, diarization_improvement_options, mfcc_speaker_similarity, whisperx_turbo_transition

hyperedges.label: SKU Export Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Complete export workflow from upload through packaging. Critical blockers: S3 chunk merge (I1) and transcript coverage (I2). Fixed 12 bugs spanning API integration, security, memory management, and authorization. Participants: s3_chunk_merge_missing, transcript_coverage_low, esm_require_error, sku_inventory_api_404, inventory_map_typeerror, http_method_mismatch, status_validation_error, upsert_billable_units_stackoverflow, admin_role_validation_missing, rls_policy_too_permissive, audio_cleanup_memory_leak, mock_data_silent_fallback, admin_exports_800_line_limit, handle_execute_double_lock

nodes.norm_label: sku u-a03 - voice + dialog act labels

nodes.label: Information Reduction Principle (1 Action Per Screen)
nodes.norm_label: information reduction principle (1 action per screen)

nodes.label: Conversational AI with Dialog Act Labels
nodes.norm_label: conversational ai with dialog act labels

nodes.label: RATIONALE: GPU Inference Ban (Medical Device Risk)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: gpu inference ban (medical device risk)

nodes.label: RATIONALE: Value Range Display Not Single ₩ (Precision Avoidance)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: value range display not single ₩ (precision avoidance)

nodes.label: WCAG 2.1 AA + Neurodiversity Design
nodes.description: Accessibility standards with anti-false-expectation principle. No countup animations, no single confirmed values.

nodes.label: 3-Space Information Architecture
nodes.description: Mobile app IA with ValueRangeCard, VaultCard, RefineryReportCard, ReadinessSKUCard components and data binding matrix

nodes.label: Motion Design Rules
nodes.description: Allowed: fade+slide 12px, scale tap, slide-up sheet, badge stamp, bar fill. Forbidden: bounce, infinite loops, >1s duration, layout animations, color transitions. Financial prohibition: countup animation, single highlight, confetti, real-time changes.

nodes.label: GlobalConsent State Machine
nodes.description: OFF → ON transitions with version tracking. RecordVisibility: PUBLIC_CONSENTED, PRIVATE. Sources: GLOBAL_DEFAULT, MANUAL, SKU_DEFAULT.

nodes.label: STT Worker Memory Leak
nodes.description: CRITICAL: Unclosed worker.terminate() in STT Worker causes memory leak

nodes.label: UploadQueue Concurrency Race Condition
nodes.description: CRITICAL: Race condition in flushQueue() from concurrent task execution

nodes.label: StorageInitializer Race Condition
nodes.description: HIGH: Race condition between storage initialization and early sync attempts

nodes.label: Scan Status Document-Code Mismatch
nodes.description: HIGH: DocumentScanStatus enum and document field definitions inconsistent

nodes.label: STT Network Restart Missing
nodes.description: HIGH: No STT service restart on network failure

nodes.label: Encryption Key localStorage Vulnerability
nodes.description: HIGH: Encryption key stored in unencrypted localStorage creates plaintext material leak

nodes.label: Access Token Plaintext localStorage (FIXED)
nodes.description: CRITICAL: access_token stored in plaintext localStorage. Status: Fixed by moving to httpOnly cookie

nodes.label: OAuth Redirect Unvalidated
nodes.description: CRITICAL: OAuth callback redirect_uri not validated against allowlist

nodes.label: Rate Limiting Missing
nodes.description: HIGH: No rate limiting on API endpoints. Applies to auth, upload, export endpoints.

nodes.label: Admin Role Validation Missing (FIXED)
nodes.description: CRITICAL: Admin APIs accessible to any authenticated user. Status: Fixed by adding adminMiddleware

nodes.label: RLS Policy Too Permissive (FIXED)
nodes.description: CRITICAL: export_package_items and bu_quality_metrics tables have USING(true) RLS. Status: Fixed by changing to USING(false)

nodes.label: S3 Chunk Merge Not Implemented
nodes.description: CRITICAL: S3 stores chunks ({sessionId}-001.wav, -002.wav) but code expects single file. NoSuchKey error.

nodes.label: Transcript Coverage Low
nodes.description: CRITICAL: Only 1/32 sessions have transcript_chunks. Blocks 1-hour package generation with requireTranscript=true

nodes.label: Audio Pipeline Unification
nodes.description: Move preprocessing from TS (incomplete) to Java (source of truth). Six phases. Solves D1-D10 mismatches (silence threshold, order, gain normalization, guard frames, noise reduction, fingerprinting).

nodes.label: Voice Enrollment Level 2
nodes.description: Segment-level speaker labeling (USER vs PEER). Two approaches: A (JS→Java embedding transfer), B (Java self-embedding)

nodes.label: MFCC Speaker Similarity
nodes.description: Pipeline: pre-emphasis → framing → windowing → FFT → Mel filter → log → DCT. Methods: cosine, DTW, GMM. Limitations: emotion-sensitive, noise-vulnerable, 1-2s minimum. Alternative: deep learning embeddings.

nodes.label: Pyannote Speaker Diarization Accuracy
nodes.description: Merges similar-sounding voices in Korean calls (utterance 431: 29.59s single label). Causes: Korean language limitation, similar timbre, short turn-taking, chunk-wise independence, missing min_speakers hint.

nodes.label: Diarization Improvement Options
nodes.description: A: Model upgrade (3.1), B: WeSpeaker post-processing (recommended mid-term), C: Chunk inter-speaker mapping, D: min_speakers hint (recommended immediate), E: Streaming mode (refactor). Phased approach: Phase 1 (D), Phase 2 (B), Phase 3 (C+A).

nodes.label: WhisperX large-v3-turbo Transition
nodes.description: Dev only. Results: VRAM −31.7% (5393→3685 MiB), 2.4x speedup (RTF 0.114→0.048), quality maintained (no Q. hallucinations). 139 test tasks, 0 errors.

nodes.label: ValueRangeCard
nodes.description: Displays value range (₩X~₩Y) with conditional display. Part of 3-Space IA.

nodes.label: VaultCard
nodes.description: Part of 3-Space IA. Displays vault/storage information.

nodes.label: RefineryReportCard
nodes.description: Part of 3-Space IA. Displays refinery/quality report.

nodes.label: ReadinessSKUCard
nodes.description: Part of 3-Space IA. Displays SKU readiness status.

nodes.label: PrivacyControlCenterPage
nodes.description: 2-step delete confirmation flow. Part of consent and privacy management.

nodes.label: Consent Edge Cases
nodes.description: Five edge cases (EC-01 through EC-05) with handling logic for GlobalConsent state transitions

nodes.label: Consent Test Cases
nodes.description: Ten test cases (T01-T10) covering unit and integration scenarios

nodes.label: ESM require Error (FIXED)
nodes.description: B1: ffmpegProcessor.ts required() in ES module scope. Fixed: import ffmpegStatic with as unknown as string cast.

nodes.label: SKU Inventory API 404 (FIXED)
nodes.description: B2: Frontend /api/admin/sku-inventory vs backend /api/admin/inventory path mismatch. Fixed: Changed frontend to /api/admin/inventory

nodes.label: inventory.map TypeError (FIXED)
nodes.description: B3: API response not array. Fixed: Added Array.isArray() guards in adminStore.ts and AdminBuildWizardPage.tsx

nodes.label: HTTP Method Mismatch (FIXED)
nodes.description: B4: POST /export-requests/:id/confirm vs backend PUT. Fixed: Changed frontend POST to PUT (2 locations).

nodes.label: Status Validation Error (FIXED)
nodes.description: B5: Cannot process, current status draft, expected queued. Fixed: Added saveExportJob() and confirmExportRequest() sequence in handleExecute.

nodes.label: upsertBillableUnits Stack Overflow (FIXED)
nodes.description: B6: 2,206 BUs caused stack overflow in JSON.stringify + AES-256-GCM. Fixed: 200-unit batching.

nodes.label: Audio Cleanup Memory Leak (FIXED)
nodes.description: B9: <audio> elements not cleaned up on component unmount. Fixed: Added pause() + src='' in useEffect cleanup.

nodes.label: Mock Data Silent Fallback (FIXED)
nodes.description: B10: API failures displayed mock data silently. Fixed: Removed MOCK constants, use empty arrays, error idle recovery.

nodes.label: admin-exports.ts 800-Line Limit (FIXED)
nodes.description: B11: 884 lines exceeded 800 limit. Fixed: Extracted ledger-entries + delivery-records to admin-ledger.ts (884→684 lines).

nodes.label: handleExecute Double-Lock Issue (FIXED)
nodes.description: B12: Wizard locked BUs, process API found 0 available. Fixed: Removed locking/delivery/settlement from handleExecute; process API handles it.

nodes.label: Batch Apply Consent
nodes.description: 500-unit chunking with cancellation support for applying consent changes to multiple records

nodes.label: readFile stat() Pre-Check Missing
nodes.description: NEW: 3 locations missing stat() pre-check before readFile operations

nodes.label: Base64 Conversion OOM
nodes.description: LOW: 50MB+ file causes OOM from base64 conversion in 3 locations

links.label: Accessibility principles enforce motion rules
links.description: Anti-false-expectation principle requires strict motion constraints
